galders-tower::choice_or_mode.issue: Actionable open: Mode choices need first-class mode/option fields when a spell exposes several distinct operations.
galders-tower::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a choice/mode bucket with option-specific targets/effects.
galders-tower::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Keep existing Utility Options or descriptions until mode schema propagation.

galders-tower::created_object_or_structu.issue: Actionable open: Created structures, wards, huts, mounts, or servants need durable object/entity fields.
galders-tower::created_object_or_structu.recommendedJsonChange: Use current summon/utility/terrain data as interim representation.

galders-tower::environmental_change.issue: Actionable open: Environmental changes need reusable world-state fields for weather, obscurement, growth, gas, liquids, and hazards.
galders-tower::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Use current terrain/damage/utility fields as interim data.

gaseous-form::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Closed: Reviewed in the level-3 residual sweep; attack_or_save_modifier is already covered by current save, attack, target, filter, or prompt fields where this row applies.
gaseous-form::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required from this residual row.
gaseous-form::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: No JSON change required from this residual row.

gaseous-form::movement_or_repositioning.issue: Actionable open: Movement/repositioning rules need actor/effect movement fields when the moved thing is not just the target.
gaseous-form::movement_or_repositioning.recommendedJsonChange: Use current MOVEMENT or Utility Options until propagation.

gaseous-form::terrain_or_surface.issue: Actionable open: Terrain/surface rules need stronger terrain, surface, passability, and environmental-state fields when not already covered by TERRAIN.
gaseous-form::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Use current terrain/utility representation as interim data.

gaseous-form::object_stats_or_damageabil.issue: Closed residual duplicate: a manual review row already resolved this finding as represented, wrong-bucket, or tracked under a more specific open bucket. No mechanic is being discarded by closing this generic residual row.

gaseous-form::object_stats_or_damageabil.recommendedJsonChange: No JSON change required from this residual duplicate.

gaseous-form::status_or_state_change.issue: Actionable open: Some state changes are not simple D&D conditions and need state-change fields.
gaseous-form::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add state-change bucket fields for non-condition states.
gaseous-form::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Use STATUS_CONDITION where possible and Utility Options elsewhere.

gaseous-form::damage_reduction_or_preven.issue: Actionable open: Damage prevention/reduction needs explicit reducibility and prevention fields.
gaseous-form::damage_reduction_or_preven.recommendedJsonChange: Use defensive/utility effects as interim representation.
gaseous-form::damage_reduction_or_preven.reviewerNote: Closed because Gaseous Form now has structured and runtime DEFENSIVE resistance for Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage, plus conditionImmunity for Prone. Movement/form-state and ending details remain open in their separate buckets.

gaseous-form::conditional_ending.issue: Closed residual duplicate: the detailed Gaseous Form row now records target 0-HP and target Magic-action self-ending in structured markdown and runtime JSON.
gaseous-form::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional template change required from this residual duplicate.
gaseous-form::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: No additional JSON change required from this residual duplicate.
gaseous-form::conditional_ending.closedReason: The detailed manual row closes this mechanic by adding target_drops_to_0_hp and target_uses_magic_action_to_end_effect conditional endings to Gaseous Form.
